name: Spiked Jello
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sprinkle the gelatin over 5 cups of boiling water and let it sit for about 5 minutes.
2. Stir in the 2 cups of vodka until well combined.
3. Add the dissolved gelatin mixture to the Jello box mix and stir gently until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Pour the mixture into a serving dish or punch bowl.
5. Refrigerate until set, at least 4 hours or overnight.
6. Before serving, turn off the refrigerator or place in a cool area to allow it to come to room temperature slightly if desired.
